creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've committed a version of this port.  This greatly helps the logstash7 port as well.

I don't see that we have a port of kibana7 yet.  I don't know if anyone is working on that.  I found that it seemed to insist on having node 10.15.2 to run, which was a problem since the FreeBSD port is at 10.17.0.
